/** * Identifies the language of a set of input fields using Tika's * LanguageIdentifier. Also supports mapping of field names based * on detected language. * The tika-core-x.y.jar must be on the classpath *

* See http://wiki.apache.org/solr/LanguageDetection * @since 3.5 */
